refusal: Refuse the next temporary carry-along reminder as the default action. It would add another local workaround to a collection process already showing repeated exceptions.
mechanism_reframe: The repeated mechanism is side-channel repair: each missing or failing record condition gets patched near one unit, so the underlying intake and authority problem stays unchanged and the next exception simply appears in a new form.
upstream_next_action: Escalate to the collection/depot process owner to create a single authoritative exception-handling rule before the next affected unit moves forward.
